InstanceBindingLabel.action: Operation to perform on the instance; current value: bind
InstanceBindingLabel.attachRelatedResourceTag: Whether to also bind tags to associated resources (CDS system disk, data disk, EIP, snapshot, snapshot chain). true: bind together; false: do not bind together. Defaults to false if not specified
InstanceBindingLabel.changeTags: List of tags to unbind; see TagModel for data format
